race.comment: WYANDRA (7) has had a few chances but does look well placed again. He's placed in his past four, just finding one better last start at Werribee when finding the line well, beaten 1.3 lengths. His two 1200m runs prior read well for this and a repeat sees him very hard to hold out. SATTVA (12) resumes. Two runs last time in were solid, fifth in a stronger maiden in town when fresh last campaign. She can improve again and take catching. FOXSKY (3) is racing consistently in his first campaign and maps to effect from the inside gate. MACCA'S ANGEL (10) has been thereabouts this time in and is in the each-way mix.
